visuals.title: The NLP Pipeline
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Natural Language Processing Basics</text>

  <!-- Input Text -->
  <rect x="110" y="60" width="200" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Input Text
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow down -->
  <path d="M210 105 L210 125" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="210,125 205,120 215,120" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <!-- Tokenization -->
  <rect x="60" y="130" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Tokenization
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- POS Tagging -->
  <rect x="240" y="130" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    POS Tagging
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrows down -->
  <path d="M120 175 L120 195" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="120,195 115,190 125,190" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <path d="M300 175 L300 195" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="300,195 295,190 305,190" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <!-- Feature Extraction -->
  <rect x="60" y="200" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="120" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Feature Extraction
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Parsing -->
  <rect x="240" y="200" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="300" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Parsing
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrows down -->
  <path d="M120 245 L120 265" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="120,265 115,260 125,260" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <path d="M300 245 L300 265" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="300,265 295,260 305,260" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <!-- ML Model -->
  <rect x="150" y="270" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="4.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="295" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    ML Model
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow down -->
  <path d="M210 315 L210 325" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="210,325 205,320 215,320" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="4.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <!-- Output -->
  <rect x="110" y="330" width="200" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="5.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="355" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Output (Analysis/Understanding)
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="5.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

</svg>
